title: AbbVie Full-Year and Fourth-Quarter 2025 Earnings Highlights
text: AbbVie reported full-year 2025 net revenues of $61.160 billion, up 8.6% on a reported basis, and fourth-quarter net revenues of $16.618 billion, up 10.0% year over year. Adjusted diluted EPS for the fourth quarter was $2.71, while full-year adjusted diluted EPS was $10.00. The strongest growth came from immunology and neuroscience. In the fourth quarter, immunology revenue rose 18.3%, led by Skyrizi revenue of $5.006 billion, up 32.5%, and Rinvoq revenue of $2.374 billion, up 29.5%. Humira revenue declined 25.9% because of biosimilar competition, showing the continuing transition away from AbbVie's older blockbuster drug. Neuroscience revenue increased 17.9%, supported by Vraylar, Botox Therapeutic, Ubrelvy, and Qulipta. AbbVie also issued 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance of $14.37 to $14.57, pointing to expected growth in the next year.
